vanillaskills.msg.graduated: ★ You've graduated to the main Bounty Board! Every quest is now available.
vanillaskills.msg.deepslate: You need a Steel-tier or better pickaxe to mine deepslate.
vanillaskills.lane.health.header:
Raises your maximum health.
+2 hearts per tier, up to +20 hearts.
vanillaskills.lane.speed.header:
Move faster on foot.
+2% walk speed per tier, up to +30%.
vanillaskills.lane.mining.header:
Mine blocks faster.
Stacking mining efficiency — max it out to
instamine stone with an Efficiency V pickaxe.
vanillaskills.lane.luck.header:
Raises your Luck (+0.5 per tier, up to +5).
Better loot from chests, vaults & fishing.
vanillaskills.lane.damage.header:
Hit harder in melee.
+1 attack damage per tier, up to +10.
vanillaskills.lane.guardian.header:
Take less damage.
+1 armor per tier, up to +10.
vanillaskills.lane.reach.header:
Place and hit from further away.
+0.5 block & entity reach per tier (max +2.5).
vanillaskills.lane.mountaineer.header:
Auto-step up ledges up to 1.1 blocks tall.
Sneak to walk normally. Toggle: /skill toggle stepup.
vanillaskills.lane.aquatic.header:
Underwater mastery: longer breath,
faster swimming, and quicker underwater mining.
vanillaskills.lane.armorsmith.header:
Unlocks crafting each armor tier,
Hardwood up to Dragon. Paid in Quest Shards.
vanillaskills.lane.toolsmith.header:
Unlocks crafting each tool tier,
Hardwood up to Dragon. Paid in Quest Shards.
vanillaskills.lane.brewmaster.header:
Beneficial potions last longer —
+10% duration per tier, up to +50%.
vanillaskills.lane.evasion.header:
Chance to fully dodge incoming arrows.
+2% per tier, up to 20%.
vanillaskills.lane.cultivator.header:
Bonus crops when harvesting mature crops.
+20% chance per tier, up to a guaranteed extra.
vanillaskills.lane.nightvision.header:
A capstone granting permanent Night Vision.
Toggle with /skill toggle nightvision.
vanillaskills.recipe.hardwood.desc:
The base material for all Hardwood gear.
Then craft any tool or armor in its normal
shape using these Wood blocks (not planks).
Hardwood swords & axes poison on hit.
vanillaskills.guide.mending_on: Mending works normally on this server.
vanillaskills.guide.mending_off: Mending is removed - it never appears anywhere.
vanillaskills.guide.page.0:
VanillaSkills

A server-side progression overhaul.

Skill Shards: from advancements.
Quest Shards: from bounties.

Type /help for commands.
vanillaskills.guide.page.1:
Skill Tree (/skill)

Spend Skill Shards on lanes of perks: health, speed, mining, combat, and more.

Unlocks are permanent - choose wisely.
vanillaskills.guide.page.2:
Skill Tree

Click a node to buy it and everything below it on that path.

Bottom-left shows your Shards; bottom-right, your stats.
vanillaskills.guide.page.3:
Earning Skill Shards

Each advancement grants Skill Shards once:

tasks - a little
goals - more
challenges - a lot

Earn them all to afford the whole tree.
vanillaskills.guide.page.4:
Bounty Board
(/quests or /bounty)

Three bounties at a time, refreshing on a timer.

Gather items or slay mobs to earn Quest Shards.
vanillaskills.guide.page.5:
Bounty Board

New players begin with {GRAD} fixed starter quests - always available, no rotation.

Finish them all to graduate to the shared main board.
vanillaskills.guide.page.6:
Quest Shop

Open it from the bounty board - a rotating set of boost items, bought with Quest or Skill Shards.

A converter trades {CONVERT} Quest Shards for 1 Skill Shard.
vanillaskills.guide.page.7:
Crafting Ladders

Armorsmith & Toolsmith (paid in Quest Shards) gate crafting EVERY gear tier - vanilla and custom.

Wood & stone stay free. Found or traded gear always works.
vanillaskills.guide.page.8:
Deepslate

Deepslate and its ores need a Steel-tier or better pickaxe (Steel, Diamond, Crystalline, Netherite, Dragon).

Unlock Steel in the Toolsmith lane to dig the deep layer.
vanillaskills.guide.page.9:
Gear Materials

Hardwood armor: from Wood blocks (all-bark, like Oak Wood) - not logs or planks.

Rose Gold ingot: 4 gold + 4 copper.
vanillaskills.guide.page.10:
Gear Materials

Steel ingot: forge iron + iron in an anvil.

Crystallized Diamond: 6 amethyst shards + 2 diamonds + 1 amethyst block = 2.
vanillaskills.guide.page.11:
Set Bonuses

Rose Gold: immune to bad effects; piglins stay neutral.

Crystalline: reflects 25% of melee damage.

Dragon: immune to fire, lava & breath.
vanillaskills.guide.page.12:
Dragon Gear

Slay the Ender Dragon for 8 Dragon Scales. Ring a Netherite Ingot with them for a Dragon Ingot.

Sneak in midair to dive-dash.
vanillaskills.guide.page.13:
Dragon Upgrade

Find a Dragon Upgrade template in End City treasure (~4%).

Smithing: template + netherite armor + Dragon Ingot = Dragon armor (keeps enchants).
vanillaskills.guide.page.14:
Dragon Elytra

Drop a Dragon chestplate and an Elytra onto an anvil to fuse them into a gliding chestplate.

A grindstone splits them again.
vanillaskills.guide.page.15:
Fortune IV & V

Find a Fortune Upgrade template in Ancient City or mineshaft chests.

Two Fortune III books + the template (lapis & diamond blocks) = Fortune IV. IV + IV = V.
vanillaskills.guide.page.16:
Potions

Brewmaster (5 nodes): beneficial potions last up to +50% longer.

Potions stack to 16.
